_comment_purpose: Example ~/.claude/settings.json wiring for the MultiAgentSystem hooks. Both hooks are opt-in. Copy or merge into your real settings.json; do not point Claude Code at this example file directly. Remove either hook entry you do not want.
_comment_paths: Adjust the absolute paths to your MultiAgentSystem checkout. Default example assumes D:/Projects/MultiAgentSystem (Windows).
_comment_bash_alternative: For WSL / Git Bash / macOS / Linux, replace each `command` value with: bash /path/to/MultiAgentSystem/claude-code/hooks/<hook-name>.sh
_comment_schema_note: Hook schema follows Claude Code's settings.json format. If your Claude Code version uses a different shape (e.g. flat `command` key instead of nested `hooks` array), adapt accordingly. Verify with `/config` or Claude Code's settings docs after copying.
